iter1_panel.description: Iter-1 2-period panel: subset of 38 observations for demo (15 doubly-observed non-OECD, 3 doubly-observed OECD, 2 single non-OECD countries)

iter3_panel.description: Iter-3 7-period panel: subset of observations from 10 countries for selection diagnostic demo

bootstrap_wb.note: Bootstrap uses moment-matching approximation. WB tertiary merged dataset not stored as standalone file. p-value should be interpreted cautiously.

power_curves.note: MDE computed under few-clusters t-approximation: MDE(G) = (t_{α/2}(G−1) + t_{1−power}(G−1)) × σ_ε / (σ_x3 × √G). σ_x3 approximated as σ_E × σ_G × σ_S (uncorrelated product approximation).
